slots.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL)
slots.subtitle: Quarterly review — price action and revenue snapshot

slots.title: AAPL — price action
slots.subtitle: Daily candles, 2023–2026

commentary.heading: Trend
commentary.body: Primary uptrend intact above the 200-day average. Higher lows since the October trough; momentum **constructive** but extended.

commentary.heading: Levels
commentary.body:
- Support: $215 (prior breakout), $198 (200-dma)
- Resistance: $242 all-time high
- Risk/reward favors waiting for a pullback toward support

slots.story: **The point:** Uptrend intact, but extended — wait for a pullback toward $215 before adding.

slots.title: Ecosystem comparison
slots.subtitle: How AAPL stacks up against platform peers

companies.name: Apple
companies.mechanism: Hardware install base monetized via Services attach

companies.name: Alphabet
companies.mechanism: Search/ads margin engine funding platform bets

takeaway.heading: Takeaway
takeaway.body: Apple's **profit sensitivity** to its own ecosystem is the cleanest of the three — the others carry more narrative than earnings torque.

slots.story: **The point:** Apple converts ecosystem strength into profit more reliably than either peer.

slots.title: Smartphone value chain
slots.subtitle: Where Apple sits, upstream to downstream

layers.name: Device platform
layers.role: Brand, silicon design, OS — captures most chain profit

layers.name: Services & apps
layers.role: App Store rake, subscriptions on the install base

takeaway.heading: Takeaway
takeaway.body: Profit pools concentrate at the **platform layer** — the chain exists to feed it.

slots.story: **The point:** Profit pools concentrate at the platform layer — AAPL and TSM are the only scarce nodes.

slots.title: Revenue snapshot

commentary.heading: Analyst view
commentary.body:
Growth re-accelerated on Services strength while Products stayed flat. Watch:
- Services mix now above one quarter of revenue
- Gross margin tailwind from mix shift
- FX drag fading into H2

slots.story: **The point:** Growth re-accelerated to +5.1% YoY on Services mix — the quality of revenue is improving.
